name: kurrent
description: Pre-built skills and agents that allow you to build, connect, debug and operate applications with Kurrent, including migration tooling for legacy EventStoreDB clients

interface.shortDescription: Kurrent agent plugin with skills and MCP servers
interface.longDescription: Pre-built skills and agents that allow you to build, connect, debug and operate applications with Kurrent, including migration tooling for legacy EventStoreDB clients
defaultPrompt: Connect to KurrentDB from my app and append a first event
Set up a catch-up subscription to $all with a checkpoint
Diagnose why my client can't reach the KurrentDB cluster
Deploy a KurrentDB cluster on Kurrent Cloud using the esc CLI
Configure a connector to write events into Kafka
Migrate off the legacy TCP EventStoreConnection client
